page_metadata.biotools__summary: Query functionalities are designed to fulfill most frequent analysis needs of cancer researchers with a view to generate novel hypotheses. It stores gene, microRNA (miRNA) and protein expression profiles, copy number alterations for multiple cancer types, and protein-protein interaction information.

It stores gene, microRNA (miRNA) and protein expression profiles, copy number alterations for multiple cancer types, and protein-protein interaction information.
